scripts.build: pnpm --filter @urms/shared build && pnpm --filter @urms/domain build && pnpm --filter @urms/logger build && pnpm --filter @urms/db build && pnpm --filter @urms/api build && pnpm --filter @urms/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @urms/domain test && pnpm --filter @urms/db test && pnpm --filter @urms/api test
